# services.blockbook-frontend

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.blockbook-frontend`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.blockbook-frontend` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more blockbook-frontend instances. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.certFile` | `null or absolute path` | To enable SSL, specify path to the name of certificate files without extension. Expecting {file}`certFile.crt` and {file}`certFile.key`. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.coinName` | `string` | See <https://github.com/trezor/blockbook/blob/master/bchain/coins/blockchain.go#L61> for current of coins supported in master (Note: may differ from release). |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Location of the blockbook configuration file. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.cssDir` | `absolute path` | Location of the dir with {file}`main.css` CSS file. By default, the one shipped with the package is used. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Location of blockbook-frontend-‹name› data directory. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.debug` | `boolean` | Debug mode, return more verbose errors, reload templates on each request. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable blockbook-frontend application. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.extraCmdLineOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options to pass to Blockbook. Run blockbook --help to list all available options. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Additional configurations to be appended to {file}`coin.conf`. Overrides any already defined configuration options. See <https://github.com/trezor/blockbook/tree/master/configs/coins> for current configuration options supported in master (Note: may differ from release). |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.group` | `string` | The group as which to run blockbook-frontend-‹name›. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.internal` | `null or string` | Internal http server binding `[address]:port`. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.messageQueueBinding` | `string` | Message Queue Binding `address:port`. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.package` | `package` | The blockbook package to use. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.public` | `null or string` | Public http server binding `[address]:port`. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.rpc.password` | `string` | RPC password for JSON-RPC connections. Warning: this is stored in cleartext in the Nix store!!! Use `configFile` or `passwordFile` if needed. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.rpc.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing password of the RPC user. Note: This options is ignored when `configFile` is used. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.rpc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.rpc.url` | `string` | URL for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.rpc.user` | `string` | Username for JSON-RPC connections. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.sync` | `boolean` | Synchronizes until tip, if together with zeromq, keeps index synchronized. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.templateDir` | `absolute path` | Location of the HTML templates. By default, ones shipped with the package are used. |
| `services.blockbook-frontend.<name>.user` | `string` | The user as which to run blockbook-frontend-‹name›. |
